disambiguation_rules.the department: Department of State (confirmed as lead agency for United States public diplomacy)
disambiguation_rules.the secretary: Secretary of State (head of Department of State)
disambiguation_rules.secretary: In SEC. 931(b)(1), 'the Secretary' refers to the Secretary of State based on context of Foreign Military Sales policy coordination with Secretary of Defense.
disambiguation_rules.the secretary and the secretary of defen: SEC. 931(c) establishes joint responsibility between Secretary of State and Secretary of Defense for interagency policy review.
